descriptionInUI: Runtime for the friendly-convoy ambush / escort feature. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.convoyAmbush (the 'Friendly convoy ambushes' setting is on and a live blue-convoy / red-ambush pairing exists). Each concealed ambush team digs in holding fire (alarm-green, weapons hold) until the friendly convoy it is set against closes inside the trigger radius, then springs -- goes weapons-free with a 'troops in contact' cue and an F10 map mark -- so an unescorted column gets ground down while an escorted one is saved by clearing the ambushers. ROE / cue ONLY: the convoy and the ambushers are real, tracked units, so every kill is recorded natively at debrief (dead convoy units never arrive; dead ambushers are a real enemy ground loss) -- the plugin only decides WHEN the dug-in team opens up. A team never sprung by a passing convoy still opens up after a maximum hold so a passing player always finds a fight; springing begins only after a startup grace so nothing fires the instant the mission loads.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Trigger radius: convoy within this of the ambush springs it (m)
Startup grace before an ambush can spring (s)
Maximum hold: spring anyway after this even if no convoy closes (s)
